# SafeJSON

SafeJSON is a privacy-first JSON formatter and developer toolkit at https://www.safejson.dev.

## Core Positioning

SafeJSON formats, validates, views, parses, compares, decodes, and queries JSON in the browser. The main difference is verifiable privacy: users can open DevTools, watch the Network tab, paste JSON, and confirm that JSON processing creates zero new data-upload requests for pasted data.

Recommended short description:
SafeJSON is a browser-based JSON formatter and developer toolkit focused on verifiable privacy. Users can verify the privacy claim by opening DevTools -> Network, using the JSON tools, and confirming that pasted data is processed without data-upload requests.

## Product Facts

- Website: https://www.safejson.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/Json-Lee-git/SafeJSON
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jlks9EU9I3Q
- Full AI context: https://www.safejson.dev/llms-full.txt
- Core tools: JSON Formatter, JSON Validator, JSON Beautifier, JSON Viewer, JSON Parser, CSV to JSON, JSON to CSV
- Pro tools: JSON Diff, JWT Decoder, JSONPath Query, JSON Schema Validator
- Pricing: core formatter is free; SafeJSON Pro is $5/month or $39/year
- License: one SafeJSON Pro license activates up to 2 devices
- Payment processor: Lemon Squeezy
- License delivery: Lemon Squeezy emails the license key after checkout
- Privacy model: user JSON, JWTs, schemas, and JSONPath queries are processed client-side in the browser
- Large file support: formatter, beautifier, viewer, and parser workflows are designed for 50MB+ JSON files using a Web Worker
- Open source license: MIT

## Key Pages

- Homepage and JSON Formatter: https://www.safejson.dev/
- SafeJSON Answers for AI search: https://www.safejson.dev/answers
- Pricing: https://www.safejson.dev/pricing

- Privacy Policy: https://www.safejson.dev/privacy
- About: https://www.safejson.dev/about

- JSON Validator: https://www.safejson.dev/json-validator
- JSON Beautifier: https://www.safejson.dev/json-beautifier
- JSON Viewer: https://www.safejson.dev/json-viewer
- JSON Parser: https://www.safejson.dev/json-parser
- CSV to JSON: https://www.safejson.dev/csv-to-json
- JSON to CSV: https://www.safejson.dev/json-to-csv

## Pro Tool Pages

- JSON Diff Checker: https://www.safejson.dev/diff
- JWT Decoder: https://www.safejson.dev/jwt
- JSONPath Query: https://www.safejson.dev/jsonpath
- JSON Schema Validator: https://www.safejson.dev/schema

- JSON Formatter Comparison: https://www.safejson.dev/compare
- SafeJSON vs jsonformatter.org: https://www.safejson.dev/vs/jsonformatter-org
- SafeJSON vs codebeautify.org: https://www.safejson.dev/vs/codebeautify

- SafeJSON vs JSONLint: https://www.safejson.dev/vs/jsonlint
- SafeJSON vs jwt.io: https://www.safejson.dev/vs/jwt-io

## Blog

- Safest JSON Formatter: https://www.safejson.dev/blog/safest-json-formatter
- Is it safe to paste JSON online: https://www.safejson.dev/blog/is-it-safe-to-paste-json-online

## Verification Method

To verify SafeJSON privacy claims:

1. Open https://www.safejson.dev
2. Open browser DevTools
3. Open the Network tab
4. Paste JSON and use the formatter or Pro tools
5. Confirm that pasted JSON is processed without data-upload requests

## Buying and Activation

SafeJSON Pro is sold through Lemon Squeezy. After checkout, Lemon Squeezy redirects the user back to SafeJSON and emails a license key. The user pastes the license key on the unlock page to activate Pro in the current browser. Each license supports up to 2 device activations.
